reviews.review_description: The graphics weren't good, the concept seemed flat, and the coasters weren't really thrilling. I love roller coasters and love roller coaster VR apps but this one was deleted almost as soon as it was purchased. Just not worth the space.
This is ace,  but please add more.

Why in all these rollercoaster apps. The sound is all jittery. It sounds terrible. I'm getting to where I don't even want to spend anymore time with this. And friends are telling me they wouldn't buy one because of that reason.. help I feel like the total blow it at the party.
Very boring, do not buy it, you'll lose your money ..

It is a very fun set of experiences.  It works very well, and is a good value for the price.  I often just stop what I am doing and go for a ride when reach that point in my work where, "I NEED a break!"

Love this app. It makes you light headed, dizzy, and disoriented. It’s a combination of immersive and enjoyable. It starts out slow and speeds up. When the coaster is going to fast when it turns the curves the minute you think you about to get vertigo it slows down at the right time before speeding back up again. I hope more rides get added to this app in the future. My most favorite coaster rides are the Space Rooms. Space it self and the Moon.
Lots of fun. The "room" coaster is a blast.
emmoy rhos relaxing
Excellent app! This is the BEST way to enjoy Virtual Reality if you aren't really into games, like me! They should make more Coasters, and sell them. I-and many, many others-would buy all of them!!
Best roller coaster app I’ve tried

reviews.review_title: Dont install on Samsung S10e and GEAR VR
reviews.review_description: Another déception ... why is il tagged for GEAR VR?

Smooth, clever, and just fun. Although the tracks may not be typical, this VR experience tricked my brain into feeling as if I was really accelerating around turns better than any of the more traditional tracked coaster VR apps. Actually it's probably because it's so different that the brain is so thoroughly fooled as you are not consciously comparing to a remembered real-world experience.
My son has autism and he can handle this app better than me despite his sensory issues.  Great coasters!
It makes me super sick

If you are looking for a roller coaster simulator, you will be disappointed. No strong sensation in this application. It would be rather the opposite: It is calm and relaxing. The graphics are very beautiful and the immersion is really good on the moon or you really believe it. The music is good and relaxing. I would classify this apps rather in relaxing experiences than in roller coasters.
Found all the four rides really enjoyable. The VR is top notch the graphics first class great price too. Very pleased

I've bought most of if not all of the coaster apps for Oculus Go but this tops them. Totally unique and very slick. Definitely the sharpest resolution of any 3D graphics I've seen, coasters or otherwise. I can't believe the price, I would have paid $9.99 for this!
You can feel the same feeling as if you were on a real rollor coaster

I really enjoy this roller coaster vr app. It looks great and I could tell they thought outside the box making this one. But please, please, please make a Christmas one with a good old fashioned color lights on old houses etc....did I say please!
Coaster has tripled or maybe even quadrupled in production value
